name: Unleash: Mecha
descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Power:Arg1] Temporary {STR}. Obtain Keyflare equal to Erica's Keyflare Regen. Dispel self {Weakness} state. Whenever 1 card enters {Ultra Space}, transform to {Retract: Mecha}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Power:Arg1] Temporary {STR}. Obtain Keyflare equal to Erica's Keyflare Regen. Dispel self {Weakness} state. Add 1 "Strike" with {Exhaust} attached by Erica to your hand. Whenever a card enters the {Ultra Space}, transform into {Retract: Mecha}.
